edge_hypothesis: Supertrend 8:1 is the all-weather champion (PF=1.921) on 1h/4h — but 15m has NEVER been tested with supertrend_follow. The core mechanism is SUPERTd direction flip = trend start. On 1h, this produces ~85 trades. On 15m, Supertrend flips happen ~4x more frequently (every 2-6 hours vs every 8-24 hours), potentially yielding 300-500 trades. The FREQUENCY THESIS: if Supertrend's signal quality per flip is similar across timeframes, then 15m produces MORE signals at comparable quality. At extreme R:R, each wrong flip is a cheap 1.5x ATR loss, while each correct flip riding a 4-12 hour momentum wave produces 9-15x ATR gains. The counter-argument: 15m Supertrend flips are noisier — intraday whipsaws produce false flips that 1h smooths out. If this is dominant, PF will be < 1.0 regardless of R:R. THREE OUTCOMES: (1) PF > 1.3 with 200+ trades = 15m is a high-frequency diversification layer (uncorrelated to 1h timing), add to portfolio. (2) PF 1.0-1.2 = 15m captures some edge but noise degrades it — only viable at the highest R:R. (3) PF < 0.9 = 15m flip quality is fundamentally inferior, confirming 1h as Supertrend's resolution floor. Regime assumption: ALL (matching the champion — Supertrend is all-regimes profitable). ADX > 20 gate filters the worst noise on 15m. Invalidation: If PF < 0.8 across all 3 R:R variants with 300+ trades, 15m is too fast for Supertrend — close the micro-timeframe chapter.

variants.name: supertrend_15m_micro_6to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/15m with 6:1 R:R (1.5x ATR stop / 9.0x ATR TP). The CONSERVATIVE micro-variant. 6:1 is the R:R floor — the minimum that produces ACCEPTs across templates. On 15m, ATR is ~0.3-0.5% of price (vs ~1.0-1.5% on 1h), meaning tighter absolute stops and TPs. Expected 400-600 trades over the backtest period. Breakeven win rate: 14.3%. If 15m signal quality matches 1h (~20% win rate), PF should be ~1.5. If noise degrades win rate to 15-16%, still marginally profitable. This is the safety variant — if even 6:1 fails on 15m, higher R:R won't save it.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from -1 to 1 (Supertrend direction flip bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from 1 to -1 (Supertrend direction flip bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
ADX gate: ADX_14 > 20 — filters whipsaw noise on 15m
15m micro-trend test: does the champion signal work at 4x frequency?
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (9.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
R:R = 6:1. Needs 14.3% win rate to break even after fees.
Safety variant: if 6:1 fails on 15m, the micro-timeframe thesis is dead
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 9.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip on 15m — testing micro-timeframe viability
ADX_14 > 20 trend quality gate — critical noise filter on 15m
ATR_14 for 1.5x stop / 9.0x TP — 6:1 R:R conservative, STOP_FLOOR compliant

variants.name: supertrend_15m_micro_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/15m with 8:1 R:R (1.5x ATR stop / 12.0x ATR TP). The CHAMPION-MATCHED variant — same R:R as the 1h champion. Direct A/B test of timeframe effect: if 15m/8:1 produces PF > 1.5 (comparable to champion's 1.921), 15m Supertrend flips capture genuine micro-trends. If PF < 1.0, the 1h smoothing is essential and 15m noise overwhelms the signal. At 8:1, breakeven is 11.1% win rate. With 300-500 trades, even marginal edge (12-13% win rate) produces measurable PF. This variant is the centerpiece diagnostic.

entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from 1 to -1 (Supertrend direction flip bearish).

variants.name: supertrend_15m_micro_10to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/15m with 10:1 R:R (1.5x ATR stop / 15.0x ATR TP). The EXTREME stress test. On 15m, 15x ATR TP means riding a move for ~4-8% of price (on ETH that's $100-250+ at current levels). This requires catching multi-hour directional moves that START with a Supertrend flip on 15m. If such moves exist at sufficient frequency (win rate > 9.1%), this variant will be profitable. The hypothesis: 15m Supertrend catches the VERY START of intraday momentum waves — the ones that last 4-12 hours. At 10:1, we need only 1 in 10 flips to produce a sustained move. Expected: 300-500 trades, PF target > 1.1.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from -1 to 1 (Supertrend direction flip bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from 1 to -1 (Supertrend direction flip bearish).

Extreme R:R stress test: 10:1 on 15m — can micro-flips catch 4-12 hour momentum waves?

Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
R:R = 10:1. Needs 9.1% win rate to break even after fees.
